column1: Dataset Title: Arctic Vegetation Archive: Marshes of Bolshezemelskaya tundra Vegetation Plots
Dataset Author: Lavrinenko Olga, Lavrinenko Igor

Dataset Reference: Lavrinenko O.V., Lavrinenko I.A. Classification of salt and brackish marshes vegetation of the Bolschezemel’skaya tundra (Barents Sea coastal) // Phytodiversity of Eastern Europe. 2018. ?. XII, ? 3. P. 82–143. DOI: 10.24411/2072-8816-2018-10028
Dataset Table: Species Cover Data for Marshes of Bolshezemelskaya tundra Vegetation Plots

Dataset Notes: Species cover classes are the new Braun-Blanquet cover-abundance scale: r (single), + (less than 1 percent), 1 (1 to 5 percent), 2a (6 to 12 percent), 2b (13 to 25 percent), 3 (26 to 50 percent), 4 (51 to 75 percent), and 5 (76 to 100 percent). Both the dataset author determinations and the current nomenclature according to the Panarctic Species List (PASL) are listed.
